meaning: n.四肢伸开的躺卧姿势,蔓生v.四肢伸开地坐(或卧),爬行,蔓生,蔓延
examples: People sprawl in deck chairs or sit under umbrellas.
He would take two aspirin and sprawl out on his bed.
The whole urban sprawl of Ankara contains over 2.6 million people.
The traditional Noongar lands stretch across much of southwestern Australia, encompassing the urban sprawl of Perth.
But with this sprawl came incredible complexity, which managers did very little to rein in.
